pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.6 to 3.1.5 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses Spring Framework 5, which is incompatible with Java 21 features and module system changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update java.version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud BOM from 2021.0.1 to 2022.0.4 to match Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it would cause dependency resolution conflicts and runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot Admin Server version from 2.6.5 to 3.1.8 to support Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot Admin 2.x relies on Spring Boot 2.x APIs and will fail to start or compile against Spring Boot 3.x.
